summary: CoinGecko OHLC integration testing complete. Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest endpoint works correctly with real CoinGecko data (data_source=coingecko) and demo mode (data_source=mock). Frontend Simulation and Strategy Lab pages correctly display data source badges and equity curves. 9/10 backend tests passed, 1 pre-existing bug in strategy generation endpoint.

minor.issue: NameError: name 'SimulationLog' is not defined in simulation_service.py - pre-existing bug not related to new backtest feature

passed_tests: Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest with BTC/USDT, momentum, demo=false returns data_source=coingecko
Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest with demo=true returns data_source=mock
Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest with ETH/USDT returns valid data
Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest with SOL/USDT returns valid data
Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest with mean_reversion strategy returns valid data
Backend POST /api/simulation/backtest with breakout strategy returns valid data
Backend response includes all required fields: equity_curve, total_return, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, win_rate, total_trades, profit_factor
Backend backtest with 30 days minimum period works
Backend backtest with custom initial_capital (50000) works
Simulation page (/simulation?demo=true): Backtest tab shows pair/strategy selectors
Simulation page: Run Backtest button triggers API call and shows results
Simulation page: Demo Mode shows 'Demo Mode — Mock Data' badge
Simulation page: Backtest result shows equity curve bars (62 bars)
Simulation page: Backtest result shows Total Return, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Win Rate
Simulation page (non-demo): Shows 'Data: CoinGecko' badge with real market data
Strategy Lab (/lab?demo=true): Generate Strategy creates strategy card
Strategy Lab: Backtest This Strategy button shows results
Strategy Lab: Demo Mode shows 'Demo Mode — Mock Data' badge
Strategy Lab: Backtest result shows equity curve and metrics
No regressions on AI Agents page
No regressions on Event Agents page
No regressions on Marketplace page
No regressions on Research page
action_items: Fix NameError in POST /api/lab/strategies/generate - SimulationLog not defined (pre-existing bug, not blocking new feature)
critical_code_review_comments: market_data.py: OHLC fetch with 10-min TTL cache implemented correctly
backtest_engine.py: Three strategies (momentum, mean_reversion, breakout) implemented with proper signal generation
simulation.py: New POST /api/simulation/backtest endpoint correctly handles demo vs real mode
SimulationPage.jsx: Correctly passes demo flag and displays data_source badge
StrategyLabPage.jsx: Correctly displays backtest results with equity curve
seed_data_creation: None - used CoinGecko API for real data and mock generator for demo mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: CoinGecko OHLC integration fully tested. New endpoint POST /api/simulation/backtest works with real data (data_source=coingecko) and demo mode (data_source=mock). Frontend correctly displays 'Data: CoinGecko' or 'Demo Mode — Mock Data' badges. Pre-existing bug in strategy generation endpoint (SimulationLog not defined) - not related to new feature.

mocked_apis_list: Demo Mode: get_demo_ohlc() returns deterministic mock OHLC data
CoinGecko fallback: _generate_mock_ohlc() when API fails or rate limited

features_tested.simulation_backtest_btc_momentum: PASS - Returns data_source=coingecko with real data
features_tested.simulation_page_demo_mode_ui: PASS - Badge shows 'Demo Mode — Mock Data'
features_tested.strategy_lab_demo_mode_ui: PASS - Badge shows 'Demo Mode — Mock Data'
features_tested.no_regressions_other_pages: PASS - AI Agents, Event Agents, Marketplace, Research all load
